dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a moving shrine tender still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.

setting_placement.location_setting: A mobile connective polity organized as a colossal caravan-city on wheels, with trade expeditions, council-of-elders governance, consensus procedure, portable hearings, and negotiated exchange across hard routes.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane
who_depends_on_them: the continued function of Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as moving shrine tender. Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Vivan Waycord immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Vivan Waycord presents as Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a moving shrine tender still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Vivan Waycord immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane workable through the obligations of moving shrine tender while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan. Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of moving shrine tender visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of moving shrine tender visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Moving Shrine Tender, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane workable through the obligations of moving shrine tender while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for local leverage, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Vivan Waycord can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Moving Shrine Tender too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of moving shrine tender in and around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Vivan Waycord adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Vivan Waycord or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Vivan Waycord as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Vivan Waycord can propagate upward through Nomdara Caravan if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Vivan Waycord needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane.
Vivan Waycord may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Moving Shrine Tender.
rumor: People say Vivan Waycord is Known locally through day-to-day work as moving shrine tender. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
